title: cordyline fragrans
intro: Cordyline fragrans, also known as the fragrant palm lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Cordyline fragrans can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
